# WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessoryScanRequest.ID

**Type Alias**

The type of value that uniquely identifies this scan request.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias ID = UInt64
```

## Identifying a scan request

- **id**: A stable identifier that uniquely identifies this scan request.

items.description: A stable identifier that uniquely identifies this scan request.
